questions.hindi: वह शायद गया होगा, लेकिन पक्का नहीं।
options: He might have known about this.
He might have gone, but I am not sure.
questions.answer: He might have gone, but I am not sure.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह शायद गया होगा, लेकिन पक्का नहीं।" = "He might have gone, but I am not sure."
Full sentence: "She might have heard this."

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They might have agreed with me."

questions.hindi: शायद वह वहाँ पहुँच गया होगा।
options: He might have arrived by now.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "शायद वह वहाँ पहुँच गया होगा।" = "He might have reached there."
Full sentence: "She might have forgotten me."
Correct sentence: "We might have thought wrong."

options: He might have broken the promise.
